summary: Executed issue #249 governed branch cleanup with an exact one-time authorization. Claude Code reviewed the branch classification in read-only mode and returned PASS. The cleanup deleted 30 stale local branches, deleted 30 confirmed merged branches from origin, removed 4 stale remote-tracking refs whose remote refs were already absent, preserved main, the active issue #249 branch, the digital-twin branch with no merged PR, and the Tango research branch whose PR was closed without merge. After PR publication, branch inventory reports 7 refs, including the expected active PR branch on origin, instead of the stale 29-ref artifact from June 15 and the live 33-local/38-remote pre-cleanup state.
validations: claude -p compact branch cleanup read-only review: passed
branch cleanup execution: passed with no remaining failed refs
remaining local branches: codex/issue249-governed-branch-cleanup, codex/visual-digital-twin-rosario-mvp, main
remaining origin refs after PR publication: origin, origin/codex/issue249-governed-branch-cleanup, origin/codex/visual-digital-twin-rosario-mvp, origin/docs/tango-70b-research-20260617, origin/main
GitHub Actions PR #250: 4/4 checks passed on the latest checked PR head before merge
policy_result: Within the dedicated issue #249 policy. The task used only the exact branch cleanup authorization for merged PR branches. General branch cleanup remains disabled with cleanup_permission=none. No fetch, pull, prune, force push, branch rename, branch movement, branch archival, artifact cleanup, secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, dependency installation, deployment, issue #194 lifecycle change, or digital twin implementation occurred.
risk_result: High-risk branch ref mutation was contained by exact branch names, merged PR evidence, Claude Code read-only review, preserve rules, and post-cleanup inventory. Rollback for deleted branch refs would require recreating branches from the PR head SHAs recorded in GitHub PR history; no production or runtime behavior changed.
unresolved_risks: The active issue #249 work branch and matching origin PR branch are intentionally preserved until PR completion.
codex/visual-digital-twin-rosario-mvp remains preserved because it has no confirmed merged PR and issue #194 is not_planned.
docs/tango-70b-research-20260617 remains preserved because PR #227 was closed without merge.
General cleanup apply mode remains disabled and future cleanup still requires a dedicated contract.
merge_status: PR #250 is open, mergeable, and GitHub Actions passed; ready for merge under policy.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment is allowed.
